This is a plain text file that does not conform to Argdown syntax.
It contains ordinary English sentences and some unicode: café, naïve, résumé.
There are no statement definitions, argument headers, or relation markers here.
The file uses a .txt extension deliberately to signal it is not Argdown.
随机的中文字符 and some Greek: αβγδεζηθ
More plain prose follows on this line without any special markup.
No brackets denoting statements, no angle brackets for arguments.
Just regular human-readable text arranged in lines.
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
End of file.
